project.description: The application to add the theme to. If omitted you will be prompted to choose one.

theme.description: The theme to apply. Passing this runs the generator non-interactively (no prompts).

stylesEntryPoint.description: Path to the styles entry point relative to the workspace root. Auto-detected when omitted.

prefix.description: Prefix class name applied to the theme's style definitions, e.g. theme-zinc. Leave empty for a global theme.
